# Acknowledgment — Open XML SDK

The DOCX fixtures in this directory are borrowed from
[dotnet/Open-XML-SDK](https://github.com/dotnet/Open-XML-SDK)'s own test
corpus, used here to validate against real-world malformed and edge-case
OOXML documents instead of only synthetic ones.

- Upstream repo: <https://github.com/dotnet/Open-XML-SDK>
- License: MIT — see `LICENSE` in this directory.

Thanks to Microsoft and the Open XML SDK contributors for keeping their
fixtures public.

For per-file provenance and the role each fixture plays in our test suite,
see `tests/fixtures/external/README.md`.
